prose: TEMPO frontier-orbital analysis via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, PySCF) on user-supplied geometry in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (open-shell radical). SCF converged in 12 cycles. Headline property: HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.87 eV. Koopmans-derived ionization potential = 6.34 eV, electron affinity = 2.47 eV, electronegativity = 4.40 eV, hardness = 1.94 eV, softness = 0.516 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 5.00 eV. Electronic energy: −13167.145 eV. Integrity status: trustworthy (all checks pass). No warnings reported.
